# Q2 split + arrayindex project user (composite field split)

**Dataset**: `gx_08_feed` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Split / parse composite delimited fields (split + arrayindex + to_number). Q2 split + arrayindex project user. `split()` carves the delimited field into an array, `arrayindex()` picks an element (negative index = from the end).

```sql
dataset = gx_08_feed | alter parts = split(combo, "|") | alter user = arrayindex(parts, 0) | fields user, combo
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 10). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
